message:
🐛 fix: yt-dlp fallback for YouTube playlist when RSS returns 404 (#8541)

YouTube deprecated RSS feeds for some playlists. The Go handler now
tries RSS first (fast, no deps) and falls back to yt-dlp
(--flat-playlist --dump-json) when RSS returns 404.

yt-dlp is optional — if not installed, the handler returns the RSS
error as before. Works on localhost where yt-dlp is available via
brew; Netlify uses its own function which can be updated separately.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
